chapters.title: An Old Envelope
chapters.content: While cleaning the attic, Nora found an old envelope with no address. Inside, there was only half of a handwritten letter.

chapters.title: Searching for Answers
chapters.content: The letter mentioned a train station and a date from twenty years ago. Curious, Nora decided to investigate the story behind it.

chapters.title: A Forgotten Goodbye
chapters.content: At the station, she discovered the letter had been a goodbye message that was never delivered. Some mysteries were simply unfinished memories.
